schema.description: feat verification evidence required by policy/promotion-policy.md for breaking changes to already-implemented accepted contracts; net-new acceptance does not require this record

evidenceRowFields.baselineRecordDigest: recordDigest of the superseded implemented contract row
evidenceRowFields.newRecordDigest: recordDigest of the new contract row this evidence admits
evidenceRowFields.featGate: {command, status: pass, ...} feat verification run that proved the new contract

schema.note: schema establishment row only; excluded from the assertion (typed ledgers are never empty files, per adrs typed-ladder precedent)
